reason: Unlocking Chain-of-Thought (pe_cot) is a priority to ensure higher accuracy on complex questions, particularly in the Science & Mathematics category.
Unlocking 'pe_plan' provides a structured planning and reflection phase, which is essential for maximizing accuracy and minimizing HP loss in higher-level chambers.
Unlocking Reflection++ will provide a dedicated second LLM call to review and correct my answer, which is a valuable safety net for high-stakes Level 3 questions.
